ais-vs-26as-differences.prompt: Clean premium fintech illustration of two side-by-side document cards labelled Form 26AS and AIS, a magnifying glass comparing them over a soft teal gradient, Indian rupee accent. Indian context, minimal text.
ais-vs-26as-differences.alt: Form 26AS and AIS documents compared side by side with a magnifying glass

form-16-and-ais-mismatch.prompt: Minimal fintech illustration of a Form 16 sheet and an AIS sheet with mismatched figures connected by a warning bridge, a checkmark resolving the gap, calm blue and teal palette. Indian context.
form-16-and-ais-mismatch.alt: Form 16 and AIS sheets with a highlighted mismatch being reconciled

how-to-submit-ais-feedback.prompt: Premium illustration of a hand tapping a feedback button on an AIS transaction card, a duplicate entry crossed out and a corrected total appearing, soft teal background. Indian context, no heavy text.
how-to-submit-ais-feedback.alt: Submitting feedback on an AIS transaction to correct a duplicate entry

what-is-tis-in-income-tax.prompt: Clean fintech illustration of a detailed AIS receipt funnelling into a compact TIS summary card showing reported and processed totals, soft teal gradient, rupee accents. Indian context.
what-is-tis-in-income-tax.alt: Detailed AIS data summarised into a TIS card with reported and processed values

fixed-deposit-interest-in-ais.prompt: Minimal premium illustration of a bank FD certificate feeding an interest figure into an AIS panel, a small 10 percent TDS tag and a rupee coin, calm blue and teal palette. Indian context.
fixed-deposit-interest-in-ais.alt: Fixed deposit interest flowing from a bank into the AIS with a TDS tag

mutual-fund-transactions-in-ais.prompt: Clean fintech illustration of a stock and mutual fund portfolio screen reporting into an AIS panel, a gross sale value separated from a smaller capital gain figure, soft teal background. Indian context.
mutual-fund-transactions-in-ais.alt: Mutual fund and stock sales reported in AIS with gross value versus capital gain

section-143-1-intimation-explained.prompt: Premium illustration of a password-protected PDF email opening into a two-column comparison sheet with a calm green checkmark, reassuring blue and teal palette. Indian context, minimal text.
section-143-1-intimation-explained.alt: A Section 143(1) intimation shown as a two-column comparison document

defective-return-notice-139-9.prompt: Minimal fintech illustration of an ITR document with a small defect flag being corrected by a wrench and a resubmit arrow, 15-day clock in the corner, soft teal gradient. Indian context.
defective-return-notice-139-9.alt: A defective return being corrected and resubmitted within a deadline

outstanding-tax-demand-notice.prompt: Clean premium illustration of a tax demand notice on a portal screen with agree and disagree buttons and a rupee challan icon, calm blue and teal palette. Indian context, minimal text.
outstanding-tax-demand-notice.alt: An outstanding tax demand notice with agree and disagree response options

how-to-reply-to-tax-notice.prompt: Premium fintech illustration of a person calmly replying to a notice on a laptop e-Proceedings screen, document upload icon and a faceless shield, soft teal background. Indian context.
how-to-reply-to-tax-notice.alt: Replying to an income tax notice online through the e-Proceedings portal

notice-for-high-value-transactions.alt: High-value transactions tracked by SFT reporting on the tax portal

tds-mismatch-notice-resolution.prompt: Minimal premium illustration of a Form 16 TDS figure and a Form 26AS figure not aligning, a deductor revising the entry to match, soft teal gradient, rupee accent. Indian context.
tds-mismatch-notice-resolution.alt: A TDS mismatch between Form 16 and Form 26AS being reconciled

how-to-check-itr-refund-status.alt: Checking income tax refund status on a phone with a progress tracker

reasons-for-refund-failure.alt: A tax refund failing on an unvalidated bank account then succeeding

how-to-raise-refund-reissue.alt: Raising a refund reissue request and e-verifying it on the portal

refund-adjusted-against-demand.alt: A refund adjusted against a past demand under Section 245

timeline-for-income-tax-refund.alt: Income tax refund timeline from e-verification to refund paid

pre-validate-bank-for-refund.alt: Pre-validating a bank account with PAN for tax refunds
